displayMetadata.value:
• Feed up to one pouch per day for an average size adult cat

metaData.Key Information: Fancy Feast Classic Seafood Feast is a delicious combination made with seafood.
metaData.Preparation:
• Feed an average-sized adult cat 1 can per 1.4 kilograms of body weight daily
• Feed up to twice this amount to kittens
• Pregnant or nursing cats may require two to four times their normal feeding
metaData.SAP Product Name: FANCY FEAST CAT FOOD - CLASSIC SEAFOOD FEAST 85G
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool, dry place

product.name: Fancy Feast Classic Cat Food - Seafood

product.description: Delight your cat with Fancy Feast Savory Chicken and turkey Gourmet Cat Food from Purina. Fancy Feast offers your cat enchanting shapes they will love with the delicious taste of real Chicken and Turkey. Fancy feast is vitamin-fortified and provides complete and balanced nutrition for cats of all life stages including kittens.

metaData.Key Information:
• 100% complete and balancing nutrition
• Exquisite taste
• Perfect for everyday feeding
metaData.Preparation:
• Feeding directions:
For Cats Weighing 5 - 9lbs:
1. 1/3 to 2/3 cup of dry food
2. Combine 1/4 to 1/2 cup with one 3oz can of wet or mix 1/3 cup with two 3oz of can food
For Cats Weighing 10 - 14lbs:
1. 2/3 to 1 cup of dry food
2. Combine 1/2 to 3/4 cup with one 3oz can
3. Mix 1/3 to 2/3 cup with two 3oz of can food
metaData.SAP Product Name: FANCY FEAST GOURMET GOLD-CHICKEN 1.36KG
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place

product.name: Fancy Feast Dry Cat Food - Savory Chicken & Turkey

metaData.Key Information:
• Tender high protein adult cat food complement made with real, high-quality chicken, vegetables and whitefish in a silky, decadent broth for added flavor and moisture
• These high-quality gourmet broth adult cat food toppers are intended as a complement to her complete and balanced diet
• With wet cat food chicken, vegetables and whitefish, this broth for cats is part of the complete line of Purina Fancy Feast gourmet cat complements
• Grain free wet cat food complement made with no by-products, fillers, or artificial flavors, colors or preservatives
• Each cat broth pouch is perfectly sized and ready to pour for easy and convenient daily use
